texto: By shaping the menus we pick from, technology hijacks the way we perceive our choices and replaces them with new ones. But the closer we pay attention to the options we’re given, the more we’ll notice when they don’t actually align with our true needs.
explicacao: Citação de Tristan Harris sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “By shaping the menus we pick from, technology hijacks the way we perceive our choices and replace…” articula reflexao, design, technology em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como technology.
